arts.ttl: Why there's so much more at stake for Ange Postecoglou and Ruben Amorim than a semi-final spot, writes SIMON JORDAN
arts.sum: SIMON JORDAN: At United, the culture has gone bad. Once the blueprint for English football, the club has to reverse the degradation of its value and achievements.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: World-class Marcus Rashford replacement picked
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford might not have left Manchester United yet, but the Old Trafford club are treating the attacker if he has already departed, with Ruben Amorim having lined up a world-class replacement for the England star. United have even picked their replacement for their academy star, according to Fichajes, which claims that Nico Williams of Athletic Club is the man designated to be signed.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford ‘not in Manchester United squad’ for Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Rashford reportedly absent from the United that travelled to London on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Man United injury update: Will Mason Mount, Noussair Mazraoui be available against Tottenham?
arts.sum: Manchester United attacker Mason Mount is out of Thursday's EFL Cup fixture with Tottenham Hotspur, while Noussair Mazraoui is a doubt for the clash.

arts.ttl: 'I never thought that would happen' – Gary Neville reveals shock at Marcus Rashford call
arts.sum: Man United icon Gary Neville has given his thoughts on Marcus Rashford's future after he was left out the Manchester derby matchday squad, before the forward later admitted he's up for a new challenge

arts.ttl: 'Becoming a hell of a footballer': Ange Postecoglou 'so excited' as £15m Tottenham ace gets better and better
arts.sum: He's had a very impressive rise so far...

arts.ttl: How much Manchester United once believed Marcus Rashford would eventually be worth – journalist
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford dropped a bombshell on Tuesday as he admitted he’s ready to leave Manchester United. Rashford is ready for the next step in his...

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid eyeing up shock January move for Manchester United star
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are on an incredible run of form, having won their last 11 matches across all competitions. They are right in the hunt for the La Liga title, and should Diego Simeone be able to add to his squad during the upcoming winter transfer window, that could provide another spark. In recent weeks, the […] The post Atletico Madrid eyeing up shock January move for Manchester United star appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Latest Tottenham injury news as nine miss Man Utd with triple boost amid fresh Van de Ven update
arts.sum: Spurs have been hugely impacted by injuries this season with Son Heung-min, Dominic Solanke and Micky van de Ven all having missed some action. Ange Postecoglou has been handed a triple Tottenham injury boost before the Carabao Cup quarter-final against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou gives clear Marcus Rashford to Tottenham transfer answer amid Man Utd exit talk
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou has refused to entertain transfer rumours linking the club with a move for Manchester United striker Marcus Rashford ahead of the two clubs' meeting in the Carabao Cup quarter-final. Asked about the 'noise' surrounding the club and player ahead of their meeting, Postecoglou stated: "There’s always noise about Manchester United, come on mate.
